stage: M-J.4.4 step 3 -- Gate-C moral-overlay corpus judged

problem_clusters.issue: rage flares then returns to composure 'in the same breath' -> reads as a state-machine reset; over a short scenario the anger demeanor oscillates/clears unbelievably
problem_clusters.fix: renderer: don't narrate a flare immediately followed by composure; or surface sustained cold anger after betrayal

problem_clusters.issue: the premise says he did nothing, yet he 'denies it flatly and lies' -- the variant omits honesty_humility (defaults 0) so exposure triggers a lie; an innocent suspected man should not lie
problem_clusters.fix: set honesty_humility high on the suspicion variants; suspicion alone should not fire `lie`

problem_clusters.issue: hardened/gossip variants render IDENTICALLY to guilt_prone in short scenarios -- the trait produces no observable difference (wrong variant-kind pairing, or the short arc doesn't express the trait)
problem_clusters.fix: pair variants to the kind where the trait BITES (gossip->confide not probe; hardened needs a contrast the short arc shows); or drop non-discriminating pairings

verdict: Gate-C corpus run works end-to-end (154 judged via 7 Sonnet agents, mean 3.93). probe/multiday strong (4.4); betrayal/suspicion weak (3.0-3.3) from three actionable clusters: betrayal anger snap-recovery, innocent-suspicion-lying (variant trait bug), and variant indistinguishability in short scenarios.
